title: Fastest Vulkan
description: This is the fastest mod configuration using the Vulkan mod.
body:
## Currently, the only supported version of Minecraft is 1.21.11 Fabric & 1.21.4 Fabric.  

This is the fastest mod configuration using the Vulkan mod.
There are some minor rendering bugs.
Otherwise, it behaves just like the vanilla version.

## Features  👀

Performance improvements and minor new features have been implemented. 

### Details: 

Server-side improvements to in-game chunks and mob AI, 
Fixed lag when turning around,
Performance enhancements through changes to the rendering API and culling,
Minor bug fixes and minor feature additions

have been added.

## The Performance Gap 🔥

Vanilla : 200-250FPS

Fastest Vulkan Modpack : 450-500FPS (x2)


Operating Environment: 

Windows 11
Ryzen 5 8540u w/ Radeon 740M,
DDR5 RAM 8*2GB
NVMe 512GB SSD





## System Requirements ⚙️

Minimum: Vulkan 1.2 capable discrete GPU 
OS: Windows 10+ or Linux
RAM: 4GB system minimum,12GB allocated recommended
